id: 20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示
title: 优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示

subagents.prompt: 请为以下需求做实现设计，不要直接改代码： 用户反馈：左侧项目区域现在区分“项目”和“项目空间”；主空间当前命名为 Main，容易与分支 main 混淆，希望直接改为中文“主空间”。另外左上角显示项目空间的位置目前只显示空间名称，信息需要丰富：显示空间名称，以及分支名/工作树信息；若是工作树，需要能描述出来源分支/基准分支。 请阅读相关文档和代码，给出： 1. 涉及文件与现有数据结构/API/组件梳理。 2. 推荐的 UI 文案与展示规则（主空间、普通分支/工作树、来源分支缺…
subagents.summary:
## Handoff

### Artifacts produced
Planning only; no production code changed.

Updated:
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/brief.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/prd.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/ui.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/design.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/implement.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/checks.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/handoff.md`

### Key design conclusions
- `Main` comes from `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` `displaySpaceName()` fallback; minimal fix: change main-space fallback to `主空间`, without changing `spaceId: "main"`.
- Top-left/sidebar space info should be formatted in `SessionSidebar.tsx`:
  - Main/normal Git: `空间：主空间 · 分支：<branch>`
  - No branch: `空间：主空间 · 未检测到 Git 分支`
  - WorkTree: `空间：<spaceName> · WorkTree：<branch|未知分支> · 基准：<base|未知>`
- Existing data has `branch/mainWorktreeBranch` but not creation-time `baseRef`. Recommended optional enhancement: persist `baseRef` on new WorkTree creation and preserve it on refresh.

### Main files for implementer
- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
- Optional data enhancement:
  - `lib/project-registry-types.ts`
  - `lib/project-registry.ts`
  - `lib/git-worktree.ts`
  - `lib/types.ts`
  - `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts`
- Docs if fields/UI change:
  - `docs/modules/frontend.md`
  - `docs/modules/library.md`
  - `docs/modules/api.md`
  - `docs/architecture/overview.md`

### Validation run
Not run; planning/design only.

Recommended after implementation:

```bash
npm run lint
node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
```

### Decisions needed
1. Should historical/manual `displayName: "Main"` also be forced to show `主空间`? Recommended: no migration; only change fallback.
2. Should WorkTree source/base be exact creation `baseRef`? Recommended: persist `baseRef` for newly created WorkTrees; old/external WorkTrees show `mainWorktreeBranch` or `未知`.

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/handoff.md",
  "content": "# handoff

## 产出

- 已完成实现设计，未修改生产代码。
- 更新规划 artifacts：`brief.md`、`prd.md`、`ui.md`、`design.md`、`implement.md`、`checks.md`、`handoff.md`。

## 关键结论

- `Main` 主要来自 `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` 的 `displaySpaceName()` fallback；最小改动是将 `space.kind === "main"` 的默认展示改为 `主空间`。
- 顶部空间信息应在 `SessionSidebar.tsx` 内新增格式化 helper：`空间：<spaceName> · 分支：<branch>` 或 `空间：<spaceName> · WorkTree：<branch> · 基准：<base|未知>`。
- 现有 registry worktree metadata 有 `branch/mainWorktreeBranch`，但没有创建时 `baseRef`；若要准确描述来源/基准，建议新增可选 `baseRef` 并在 `/api/git/worktrees` 创建后写入 registry，刷新时保留旧值。

## 建议先改文件

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
- 可选：`lib/project-registry-types.ts`、`lib/project-registry.ts`、`lib/git-worktree.ts`、`lib/types.ts`、`app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts`
- 文档：`docs/modules/frontend.md`，若新增字段再更新 `docs/modules/library.md`、`docs/modules/api.md`、`docs/architecture/overview.md`

## 验证

未运行自动验证（本轮仅规划/设计）。建议实现后运行：

```bash
npm run lint
node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
```

## 待主会话确认

1. 是否强制把历史/手动 `displayName: "Main"` 的 main space 也显示为 `主空间`？建议不迁移，只改默认 fallback。
2. WorkTree “来源/基准”是否要求保存创建时 `baseRef`？建议保存新建 WorkTree 的 `baseRef`，旧/外部 WorkTree 用 `mainWorktreeBranch` 或 `未知` 兜底。
"
}

subagents.prompt: 实现已认领子任务 PS-03。请根据 implement.md/design.md 做可选持久化 WorkTree 创建 baseRef：在 worktree metadata 中新增可选 baseRef；创建 WorkTree 后将 result.baseRef 写入 registry；刷新/同步 worktree 时保留已有 baseRef，旧/外部 worktree 无 baseRef 时 UI 可继续用 mainWorktreeBranch/未知兜底。请阅读相关文件…
subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/project-registry-types.ts` — added optional `worktree.baseRef`.
- `lib/git-worktree.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to Git/WorkTree metadata and WorktreeRecord; created WorkTrees now include `baseRef` in returned metadata.
- `lib/project-registry.ts` — persists `baseRef` when syncing newly created WorkTree spaces; preserves existing `baseRef` during refresh/discovery when Git cannot provide it.
- `lib/types.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to shared `GitInfo` / `WorktreeInfo`.
- `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts` — passes `result.baseRef` into Project Registry sync after WorkTree creation.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual `/api/projects` WorkTree creation check was run; requires dev server and creating a real WorkTree.
- Docs updates are left for PS-04 per plan.
- Existing/externally discovered WorkTrees without saved `baseRef` remain compatible; refresh preserves saved `baseRef` but cannot reconstruct missing historical creation source.

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "command": "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
p='.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/task.json'
with open(p, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    d=json.load(f)
now=datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(timespec='milliseconds').replace('+00:00','Z')
summary='''### Implementation Complete\n\n#### Files Changed\n\n- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented `SessionSidebar` main-space `主空间` fallback, enriched space subtitle/detail tooltip, and compact WorkTree badge tooltip behavior.\n- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented Project Registry WorkTree metadata, optional `baseRef`, preservation behavior, and shared Git/WorkTree type updates.\n- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented `/api/projects`, `/api/git/worktrees`, and `/api/git/info` behavior for main-space identity and WorkTree `baseRef` availability.\n- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented Project Registry main-space display invariant and best-effort WorkTree metadata/baseRef semantics.\n\n#### Verification\n\n- `git diff -- docs/modules/frontend.md docs/modules/library.md docs/modules/api.md docs/architecture/overview.md` — reviewed documentation diff.\n\n#### Notes / Risks\n\n- No lint/type-check run for this docs-only subtask.\n- Existing code stores `baseRef`, but current Sidebar projection appears to display WorkTree base from `mainWorktreeBranch`/Git metadata rather than stored `baseRef`; flagged for main session/checker attention.'''
prog=d.setdefault('implementationProgress', {})
sub=prog.setdefault('subtasks', {}).setdefault('PS-04', {'id':'PS-04'})
sub.update({
    'status':'done',
    'updatedAt':now,
    'finishedAt':now,
    'summary':summary,
})
sub.pop('currentRunId', None)
prog['updatedAt']=now
prog['activeSubtaskId']=None
prog['activeSubtaskIds']=[]
# PS-05 remains not executed by this delegated subtask; mark as ready only if still pending and dependencies are done.
ps05=prog.get('subtasks',{}).get('PS-05')
if ps05 and ps05.get('status') in (None,'pending','waiting'):
    ps05['status']='ready'
    ps05['updatedAt']=now
    prog['nextSubtaskId']='PS-05'
    prog['nextSubtaskIds']=['PS-05']
else:
    prog.setdefault('nextSubtaskIds', [])
counts={'pending':0,'waiting':0,'ready':0,'queued':0,'running':0,'blocked':0,'failed':0,'done':0,'skipped':0}
for s in prog.get('subtasks',{}).values():
    st=s.get('status','pending')
    counts[st if st in counts else 'pending']+=1
prog['counts']=counts
# Keep task-level updatedAt in sync; status remains implementing because PS-05/checks is not done.
d['updatedAt']=now
with open(p,'w',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(d,f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
    f.write('\n')
PY
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
p='.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/task.json'
d=json.load(open(p))
print(json.dumps(d['implementationProgress']['subtasks']['PS-04'], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:1200])
print(d['implementationProgress']['counts'])
print('next', d['implementationProgress'].get('nextSubtaskIds'))
PY",
  "timeout": 30
}

PS-01.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
  - 将 main space 默认 fallback 从 `Main` 改为 `主空间`。
  - 顶部空间摘要改为：
    - 普通空间：`空间：<name> · 分支：<branch>` / `未检测到 Git 分支`
    - WorkTree：`空间：<name> · WorkTree：<branch|未知分支> · 基准：<base|基准未知>`
    - missing path 追加 `路径缺失`
  - Tooltip/detail 增加多行完整信息：空间、路径、分支、WorkTree、基准；支持换行展示。

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- 未处理 PS-03：没有新增/持久化 `baseRef`，WorkTree 基准仅使用现有 `mainWorktreeBranch`，缺失时显示未知。
- 未处理 PS-02/PS-04：未增强 dropdown badge tooltip，未改文档。
- 子任务状态需由主会话/Studio 工作流侧更新；本执行环境未直接写状态。

PS-02.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
  - Added WorkTree tooltip helpers.
  - Enhanced `WorktreeBadge` `title` to show `WorkTree：<branch|未知分支> / 基准：<base|未知>`.
  - Enhanced selected path and dropdown space row tooltip to include WorkTree branch/base info plus right-click hint.
  - Kept dropdown row layout unchanged; only tooltip/title text changed.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- Base currently uses existing `mainWorktreeBranch` metadata via `resolveWorktreeBase`; no `baseRef` persistence was added per PS-02 boundary.
- Manual hover verification in a real WorkTree dropdown still needs parent/session UI check if required.

PS-03.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/project-registry-types.ts` — added optional `worktree.baseRef`.
- `lib/git-worktree.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to Git/WorkTree metadata and WorktreeRecord; created WorkTrees now include `baseRef` in returned metadata.
- `lib/project-registry.ts` — persists `baseRef` when syncing newly created WorkTree spaces; preserves existing `baseRef` during refresh/discovery when Git cannot provide it.
- `lib/types.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to shared `GitInfo` / `WorktreeInfo`.
- `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts` — passes `result.baseRef` into Project Registry sync after WorkTree creation.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual `/api/projects` WorkTree creation check was run; requires dev server and creating a real WorkTree.
- Docs updates are left for PS-04 per plan.
- Existing/externally discovered WorkTrees without saved `baseRef` remain compatible; refresh preserves saved `baseRef` but cannot reconstruct missing historical creation source.

- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented `/api/projects`, `/api/git/worktrees`, `/api/git/info` baseRef/main-space behavior.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented Project Registry main-space invariant and best-effort WorkTree metadata/baseRef semantics.

PS-05.summary:
